chapter_title.en: the Most Compassionate is Firm on the Empyrean.

text: 6 - وفي رواية أخرى قال: من زعم أن الله من شئ فقد جعله محدثا، ومن زعم أنه في شئ فقد جعله محصورا، ومن زعم أنه على شئ فقد جعله محمولا.

en.sayed-ali-raza-rizvi: 6. And in another tradition it says “Whoever claims that Allah is from something, he implies that He has been created. Whoever claims that He is in something, he implies that He is limited. And whoever claims that He is on something, he implies that He is carried by something.”
